Issuers (a financial institution, like a bank or a credit union) handle the authentication that 3-D Secure provides. Your online transactions are secured through Visa and our enhanced security makes purchasing more seamless – while still protecting you from fraud. ### 3-D Secure does not work. What do I do now? As a consumer, you should not encounter any issues with 3-D Secure. If you do, contact your issuer or bank for more information using the phone number on your card. ### How does 3-D Secure work? 3-D Secure provides an additional layer of security for e-commerce transactions prior to authorisation.
